t: Software Incompatibility With Engine Disconnect Clutch
s: A module reports a software version mismatch with the hybrid engine disconnect clutch actuator — typically after replacing one of the modules without programming the new unit to match the rest of the network.

t: Software Incompatibility With Brake Booster Control
s: A module reports a software version mismatch with the brake booster control module — typically after replacing one of the modules without programming the new unit to match the rest of the network.

t: Software Incompatibility With Battery Energy Control Module C
s: A module reports a software version mismatch with battery energy control module C — typically after replacing one of the modules without programming the new unit to match the rest of the network.

t: Software Incompatibility With Vehicle Thermal Management Control Module
s: A module reports a software version mismatch with the vehicle thermal management module — typically after replacing one of the modules without programming the new unit to match the rest of the network.

t: Software Incompatibility With Active Grille Air Shutter Module A
s: A module reports a software version mismatch with active grille shutter module A — typically after replacing one of the modules without programming the new unit to match the rest of the network.

t: Software Incompatibility With Active Grille Air Shutter Module B
s: A module reports a software version mismatch with active grille shutter module B — typically after replacing one of the modules without programming the new unit to match the rest of the network.

t: Software Incompatibility With Active Grille Air Shutter Module C
s: A module reports a software version mismatch with active grille shutter module C — typically after replacing one of the modules without programming the new unit to match the rest of the network.

t: Software Incompatibility With Active Grille Air Shutter Module D
s: A module reports a software version mismatch with active grille shutter module D — typically after replacing one of the modules without programming the new unit to match the rest of the network.

t: Software Incompatibility With NOx Sensor C
s: A module reports a software version mismatch with NOx sensor C (smart sensor with own ECU) — typically after replacing one of the modules without programming the new unit to match the rest of the network.

t: Software Incompatibility With Ion Sense Module
s: A module reports a software version mismatch with the ion sense module (used for misfire/knock detection via ionisation current at the spark plug) — typically after replacing one of the modules without programming the new unit to match the rest of the network.

t: Software Incompatibility With Hybrid/EV Battery Inductive Charger Control Module
s: A module reports a software version mismatch with the inductive (wireless) HV battery charger module — typically after replacing one of the modules without programming the new unit to match the rest of the network.

t: Invalid Data Received
s: A controller flags that the data received over the bus is implausible without identifying a specific source. Used as a generic placeholder when the more specific U04xx codes do not apply.

t: Invalid Data Received from ECM/PCM
s: A control module is communicating with the engine ECU but receives data that is implausible or out of range — wrong checksum, value frozen, or value outside expected limits. Typical effects include limp-home and incorrect dashboard readings.

t: Invalid Data Received from TCM
s: A control module is communicating with the transmission control module but receives implausible data — wrong checksum, frozen value, or out-of-range value. Often results in transmission limp-home.

t: Invalid Data Received from Transfer Case Control Module
s: A control module is communicating with the engine ECU but receives data that is implausible or out of range — wrong checksum, value frozen, or value outside expected limits. Typical effects include limp-home and incorrect dashboard readings.

t: Invalid Data Received from Gear Shift Control Module
s: A control module is communicating with the engine ECU but receives data that is implausible or out of range — wrong checksum, value frozen, or value outside expected limits. Typical effects include limp-home and incorrect dashboard readings.

t: Invalid Data Received from Cruise Control Module
s: A control module is communicating with the engine ECU but receives data that is implausible or out of range — wrong checksum, value frozen, or value outside expected limits. Typical effects include limp-home and incorrect dashboard readings.

t: Invalid Data Received from Cruise Control Front Distance Range Sensor
s: ACC receives bus messages from the radar but their content is implausible (e.g. negative distances, jittering targets). Adaptive cruise is disabled until the radar reports plausible data again.

t: Invalid Data Received from Steering Angle Sensor Module
s: ESP receives steering angle data that does not match yaw or wheel speeds. ESP and lane-keeping are deactivated until the steering angle sensor is recalibrated.

t: Invalid Data Received from Vehicle Immobilizer Control Module
s: The ECU receives an authorisation message from the immobilizer that does not match the expected rolling code. Engine start is blocked.

t: Invalid Data Received from Vehicle Security Control Module
s: The vehicle security / alarm controller is sending implausible status data (e.g. armed/unarmed jitter). Alarm and immobilizer behaviour can become unpredictable.

t: Invalid Data Received From Air Conditioning Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the A/C control module. Compressor enable, blower or refrigerant pressure values fail plausibility checks against other inputs and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Exhaust Gas Recirculation Control Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from EGR control module A. Valve position, flow or temperature values fail plausibility checks against other inputs and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Exhaust Gas Recirculation Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from EGR control module B. Valve position, flow or temperature values fail plausibility checks against other inputs and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Turbocharger/Supercharger Control Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from boost control module A. Wastegate/VTG position or boost pressure values fail plausibility checks against other inputs and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Turbocharger/Supercharger Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from boost control module B. Wastegate/VTG position or boost pressure values fail plausibility checks against other inputs and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Reductant Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the reductant control module. Dosing rate, tank level or pressure values fail plausibility checks against other inputs and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received from Parking Brake Control Module
s: The vehicle network receives EPB data that contradicts other inputs (e.g. brake reported applied while moving). Auto-Hold is disabled and EPB warnings are shown.

t: Invalid Data Received from Wheel Speed Sensor (Front, Driver Side)
s: ABS reports invalid front-driver wheel speed data. ABS, ESP and traction control are deactivated; the speedometer can be inaccurate.

t: Invalid Data Received from Wheel Speed Sensor (Front, Passenger Side)
s: ABS receives invalid front-passenger wheel speed data. ABS/ESP are deactivated until the signal becomes plausible again.

t: Invalid Data Received from Wheel Speed Sensor (Rear, Driver Side)
s: ABS receives implausible rear-driver wheel speed data. ESP and traction control are deactivated. Wheel-speed signals feed ABS, ESC, traction control, transmission and odometer — a single dropped signal disables all of these safety functions until repaired.

t: Invalid Data Received from 4WD Clutch Control Module
s: A control module is communicating with the engine ECU but receives data that is implausible or out of range — wrong checksum, value frozen, or value outside expected limits. Typical effects include limp-home and incorrect dashboard readings.

t: Invalid Data Received from ABS Control Module
s: A control module is communicating with the ABS module but receives implausible data — wrong wheel speeds, checksum errors or out-of-range values. ESP/ESC and traction control deactivate and adaptive cruise control becomes unavailable.

t: Invalid Data Received from Vehicle Dynamics Control Module
s: A control module is communicating with the engine ECU but receives data that is implausible or out of range — wrong checksum, value frozen, or value outside expected limits. Typical effects include limp-home and incorrect dashboard readings.

t: Invalid Data Received from Park Assist Control Module
s: The park assist controller is sending implausible distance or steering data. Park Assist functions are disabled.

t: Invalid Data Received from Brake System Control Module
s: A control module is communicating with the engine ECU but receives data that is implausible or out of range — wrong checksum, value frozen, or value outside expected limits. Typical effects include limp-home and incorrect dashboard readings.

t: Invalid Data Received from Brake System Control Module
s: A control module is communicating with the engine ECU but receives data that is implausible or out of range — wrong checksum, value frozen, or value outside expected limits. Typical effects include limp-home and incorrect dashboard readings.

t: Invalid Data Received From Battery Isolation/Voltage Stabilization Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the battery isolation / voltage stabilization module (typical in start/stop systems). Switching state or stabilizer voltage values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Exhaust Gas Sensor Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from exhaust gas sensor module A (smart wide-range O2 / lambda module). Lambda or pumping current values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Rocker Arm Control Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from rocker arm actuator module A (variable valve lift / cylinder deactivation). Position or pressure feedback fails plausibility checks and is rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Rocker Arm Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from rocker arm actuator module B (variable valve lift / cylinder deactivation). Position or pressure feedback fails plausibility checks and is rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From All Wheel Drive Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the AWD control module. Torque distribution or clutch position values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Throttle Actuator B Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from throttle actuator B control module. Position commanded vs. actual or motor current values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received from Power Steering Control Module
s: A control module is communicating with the engine ECU but receives data that is implausible or out of range — wrong checksum, value frozen, or value outside expected limits. Typical effects include limp-home and incorrect dashboard readings.

t: Invalid Data Received from Throttle/Pedal Position Sensor
s: The ECU receives implausible accelerator pedal or throttle data over the bus. The engine drops to limp-mode with reduced power.

t: Invalid Data Received from Body Control Module
s: A control module is communicating with the engine ECU but receives data that is implausible or out of range — wrong checksum, value frozen, or value outside expected limits. Typical effects include limp-home and incorrect dashboard readings.

t: Invalid Data Received from Information Center
s: A control module is communicating with the engine ECU but receives data that is implausible or out of range — wrong checksum, value frozen, or value outside expected limits. Typical effects include limp-home and incorrect dashboard readings.

t: Invalid Data Received from HVAC Control Module
s: A control module is communicating with the engine ECU but receives data that is implausible or out of range — wrong checksum, value frozen, or value outside expected limits. Typical effects include limp-home and incorrect dashboard readings.

t: Invalid Data Received from Vehicle Immobilizer Control Module
s: The ECU receives an authorisation message from the immobilizer that is corrupted or out of range. Engine start is blocked.

t: Invalid Data Received from Vehicle Immobiliser Control Module
s: A control module is communicating with the engine ECU but receives data that is implausible or out of range — wrong checksum, value frozen, or value outside expected limits. Typical effects include limp-home and incorrect dashboard readings.

t: Invalid Data Received from Vehicle Security Control Module
s: The vehicle security controller delivers data that does not pass plausibility checks. Alarm system or remote unlocking can behave erratically.

t: Invalid Data Received from Steering Angle Sensor Module
s: A control module is communicating with the engine ECU but receives data that is implausible or out of range — wrong checksum, value frozen, or value outside expected limits. Typical effects include limp-home and incorrect dashboard readings.

t: Invalid Data Received from Steering Wheel Angle Sensor
s: A control module is communicating with the engine ECU but receives data that is implausible or out of range — wrong checksum, value frozen, or value outside expected limits. Typical effects include limp-home and incorrect dashboard readings.

t: Invalid Data Received From V2X Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the V2X (vehicle-to-everything) communication module. Position, V2V/V2I message content or signal-quality flags fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Chassis Control Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from chassis control module A. Vehicle dynamics, ride-height or damper command values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Chassis Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from chassis control module B. Vehicle dynamics, ride-height or damper command values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Active Vibration Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the active vibration control module (active engine mounts / electric counter-vibration). Command vs. actual values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Generator A Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from generator (alternator) control module A. Field excitation, output current or voltage values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Camshaft Position Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the camshaft position actuator module. Phase angle command vs. actual values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received from Tire Pressure Monitoring Sensor
s: A control module is communicating with the engine ECU but receives data that is implausible or out of range — wrong checksum, value frozen, or value outside expected limits. Typical effects include limp-home and incorrect dashboard readings.

t: Invalid Data Received from Body Control Module
s: Other modules receive implausible body status data (e.g. all doors reported closed while ajar). Comfort and lighting features can behave inconsistently.

t: Invalid Data Received from 4-Wheel Drive Clutch Control Module
s: The 4WD coupling controller delivers implausible torque or temperature data. AWD operation is degraded; on many vehicles the driveline warning lamp illuminates.

t: Invalid Data Received From Front Distance Range Sensor — Single Sensor or Center
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the front distance range sensor (single or center-mounted long-range radar/lidar). Distance/closing-speed values fail plausibility checks and are rejected by ACC/AEB.

t: Invalid Data Received From Active Roll Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the active roll control module (active anti-roll bars). Hydraulic/electric actuator command vs. actual values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Power Steering Control Module — Rear
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the rear power steering control module (rear-wheel steering). Steer angle command vs. actual values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Differential Control Module — Front
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the front differential control module (electronic LSD or torque vectoring). Clutch/torque command vs. actual values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Differential Control Module — Rear
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the rear differential control module (electronic LSD or torque vectoring). Clutch/torque command vs. actual values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received from Park Brake Control Module
s: A control module is communicating with the engine ECU but receives data that is implausible or out of range — wrong checksum, value frozen, or value outside expected limits. Typical effects include limp-home and incorrect dashboard readings.

t: Invalid Data Received From All Terrain Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the all-terrain (drive mode) control module. Selected mode, throttle map or stability target values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Suspension Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from suspension control module B. Damper command, ride-height or air-pressure values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Front Distance Range Sensor — Left
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the front-left distance range sensor (corner radar). Distance/azimuth values fail plausibility checks and are rejected by ADAS functions.

t: Invalid Data Received From Front Distance Range Sensor — Right
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the front-right distance range sensor (corner radar). Distance/azimuth values fail plausibility checks and are rejected by ADAS functions.

t: Invalid Data Received From Accelerator Pedal Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the accelerator pedal module. Pedal position channels A and B disagree or fall outside calibration limits, and the engine reverts to a fail-safe pedal map.

t: Invalid Data Received From Vacuum Sensor A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from vacuum sensor A (typically brake booster vacuum). Pressure values fail plausibility checks against engine load and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Vacuum Sensor B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from vacuum sensor B (typically brake booster vacuum). Pressure values fail plausibility checks against engine load and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received from Drive Motor Control Module
s: A control module is communicating with the engine ECU but receives data that is implausible or out of range — wrong checksum, value frozen, or value outside expected limits. Typical effects include limp-home and incorrect dashboard readings.

t: Invalid Data Received From Emissions Critical Control Information
s: A receiving module detected implausible data tagged as emissions-critical (CARB OBD requirement). The receiver discards the message and may set the MIL because emissions monitors cannot run.

t: Invalid Data Received From ECM/PCM B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the second engine/powertrain control module (ECM/PCM B — used on V-engines with one ECU per bank or master/slave architectures). Engine torque, RPM or load values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Body Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from body control module B. BCM-relayed signals (door/lock/lighting state, ignition, theft) fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Body Control Module C
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from body control module C. BCM-relayed signals (door/lock/lighting state, ignition, theft) fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Body Control Module D
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from body control module D. BCM-relayed signals (door/lock/lighting state, ignition, theft) fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Body Control Module E
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from body control module E. BCM-relayed signals (door/lock/lighting state, ignition, theft) fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received from Gateway A
s: A subscriber module reports that the central gateway is forwarding implausible or malformed messages. Multiple modules can show seemingly unrelated faults until the gateway is repaired or reflashed.

t: Invalid Data Received from Gateway B
s: A second gateway component (or sub-gateway) is forwarding implausible data. Cross-segment functions misbehave until the affected gateway is reset or reflashed.

t: Invalid Data Received From Serial Data Gateway Module C
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from serial data gateway C. Bridged messages between sub-buses (CAN/LIN/FlexRay/Ethernet) fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Serial Data Gateway Module D
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from serial data gateway D. Bridged messages between sub-buses (CAN/LIN/FlexRay/Ethernet) fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Battery Energy Control Module C
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from battery energy control module C. SoC, SoH, current or voltage values fail plausibility checks against other inputs and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Hybrid/EV Battery Inductive Charging Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the inductive (wireless) HV battery charging module. Coil power, alignment or temperature values fail plausibility checks and are rejected, halting the wireless charge session.

t: Invalid Data Received From Generator B Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from generator (alternator) control module B. Field excitation, output current or voltage values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Mirror Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from mirror control module B. Mirror position, fold/unfold state or heating values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Serial Data Gateway Module E
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from serial data gateway E. Bridged messages between sub-buses (CAN/LIN/FlexRay/Ethernet) fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Restraints Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the restraints control module (airbag/SRS). Crash sensor or seat-belt status data fails plausibility checks and is rejected; airbag deployment thresholds may revert to a default map.

t: Invalid Data Received From Side Restraints Control Module — Left
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the left side restraints control module (side airbag/curtain controller). Side-impact sensor data fails plausibility checks and is rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Side Restraints Control Module — Right
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the right side restraints control module (side airbag/curtain controller). Side-impact sensor data fails plausibility checks and is rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Restraints Occupant Classification System Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the restraints occupant classification system (OCS) module. Seat-weight or pressure-mat values fail plausibility checks; passenger airbag enable/disable may default to enabled with the warning lamp on.

t: Invalid Data Received From Coolant Temperature Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the coolant temperature (electric thermostat) control module. Temperature setpoint vs. actual values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Information Center A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the driver information center A (instrument cluster information area). Display state or warning indicator data fails plausibility checks and is rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Information Center B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the driver information center B (instrument cluster information area). Display state or warning indicator data fails plausibility checks and is rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Head Up Display
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the head-up display (HUD). Projected speed, navigation arrows or warnings cannot be drawn correctly and may be hidden until the data clears.

t: Invalid Data Received From Parking Assist Control Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from parking assist module A. Ultrasonic distance values or trajectory commands fail plausibility checks and are rejected, suspending automated parking.

t: Invalid Data Received From Anti-Lock Brake System (ABS) Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from ABS control module B (typically secondary brake controller in twin-system architectures). Wheel-speed, slip or pressure values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Power Steering Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from power steering control module B. Steer-assist torque or motor current values fail plausibility checks and are rejected; assist may reduce or fail to a fail-safe map.

t: Invalid Data Received From Automated Driving System Control Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from automated driving system (ADS) control module A. Trajectory plan, perception fusion or actuator commands fail plausibility checks and are rejected; automated mode degrades or hands back to the driver.

t: Invalid Data Received From Automated Driving System Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from automated driving system (ADS) control module B. Trajectory plan, perception fusion or actuator commands fail plausibility checks and are rejected; automated mode degrades or hands back to the driver.

t: Invalid Data Received From Automated Driving System Interface Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the automated driving system interface module A (HMI/handover gateway between ADS and conventional vehicle systems). Status flags or take-over requests fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Automated Driving System Interface Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the automated driving system interface module B (HMI/handover gateway between ADS and conventional vehicle systems). Status flags or take-over requests fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Audible Alert Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the audible alert control module (chimes, AVAS pedestrian alert, warning tones). Tone request or volume values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Compass Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the digital compass module. Heading values fail plausibility checks against GPS heading and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Navigation Display Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the navigation display module. Map view, route or POI data fails plausibility checks and is rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Navigation Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the navigation control module. Position, route or guidance data fails plausibility checks and is rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From PTO Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the power take-off (PTO) control module. Engagement state, output speed or torque values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From HVAC Control Module — Rear
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the rear HVAC control module. Temperature setpoint, blower or vent values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Fuel Additive Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the fuel additive control module (typically cerium-based DPF additive on Eolys/PSA systems). Tank level or dosing values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Fuel Cell Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the fuel cell control module (FCEV stack manager). Stack voltage, current or hydrogen flow values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Starter / Generator Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the integrated starter-generator (ISG/BSG) control module. Torque, speed or current values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Sunroof Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the sunroof control module. Position or anti-pinch sensor values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Global Positioning System Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the GPS receiver module. Position, time or satellite-quality values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From A/C Compressor Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the A/C compressor control module (typically the inverter for an electric scroll compressor). Speed or torque values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Fuel Pump Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from fuel pump control module B. Pressure, duty cycle or current values fail plausibility checks and are rejected; engine fueling may be limited.

t: Invalid Data Received From Exhaust Gas Sensor Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from exhaust gas sensor module B (smart wide-range O2 / lambda module). Lambda or pumping current values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Restraints System Sensor A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from restraints system sensor A (satellite crash sensor). Acceleration profile values fail plausibility checks against other crash sensors and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Restraints System Sensor B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from restraints system sensor B (satellite crash sensor). Acceleration profile values fail plausibility checks against other crash sensors and are rejected.

s: A receiving module detected implausible data from restraints system sensor D (satellite crash sensor). Acceleration profile values fail plausibility checks against other crash sensors and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Restraints System Sensor E
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from restraints system sensor E (satellite crash sensor). Acceleration profile values fail plausibility checks against other crash sensors and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received from Driver Assistance System
s: A control module is communicating with the engine ECU but receives data that is implausible or out of range — wrong checksum, value frozen, or value outside expected limits. Typical effects include limp-home and incorrect dashboard readings.

t: Invalid Data Received From Restraints System Sensor G
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from restraints system sensor G (satellite crash sensor). Acceleration profile values fail plausibility checks against other crash sensors and are rejected.

s: A receiving module detected implausible data from restraints system sensor N (satellite crash sensor). Acceleration profile values fail plausibility checks against other crash sensors and are rejected.

s: A receiving module detected implausible data from seat belt pretensioner module B. Squib status or arming voltage values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Automatic Lighting Control Module

t: Invalid Data Received From Headlamp Leveling Control Module A

t: Invalid Data Received From Antenna Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the antenna control module (active antenna amplifier / diversity controller). RF signal-quality flags fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Audio Amplifier A

t: Invalid Data Received From Digital Disc Player/Changer Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from digital disc player/changer module A (CD/DVD/BD). Track, slot or fault status values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Digital Disc Player/Changer Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from digital disc player/changer module B (CD/DVD/BD). Track, slot or fault status values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

s: A receiving module detected implausible data from digital disc player/changer module C (CD/DVD/BD). Track, slot or fault status values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Headlamp Leveling Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from headlamp leveling control module B. Pitch angle or actuator position values fail plausibility checks and are rejected; auto-leveling reverts to fixed position.

s: A receiving module detected implausible data from digital disc player/changer module D (CD/DVD/BD). Track, slot or fault status values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Television

t: Invalid Data Received From Personal Computer

t: Invalid Data Received From Digital Audio Control Module A

t: Invalid Data Received From Digital Audio Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from digital audio control module B (DSP / source matrix). Channel routing, EQ or volume values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Entertainment Control Module — Rear A

t: Invalid Data Received From Telephone Control Module

t: Invalid Data Received From Telematic Control Module

t: Invalid Data Received From Door Control Module A

t: Invalid Data Received From Tachograph Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the digital tachograph module (commercial vehicle driving-time recorder). Speed, distance or driver-card values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Battery Charger Control Module A

t: Invalid Data Received From Glow Plug Control Module 2
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from glow plug control module 2. Plug current/voltage or temperature values fail plausibility checks and are rejected; cold-start strategy reverts to fail-safe.

t: Invalid Data Received From Direct Ozone Reduction Catalyst Temperature Sensor

t: Invalid Data Received From Transmission Range Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the transmission range control module. Selected gear (P/R/N/D) state fails plausibility checks against shift lever and vehicle speed and is rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Engine Coolant Pump Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the engine coolant pump (electric water pump) control module. Pump speed or flow values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Hybrid/EV Battery Interface Control Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from hybrid/EV battery interface module A. Cell-voltage, current or temperature values fail plausibility checks against other inputs and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Hybrid/EV Battery Interface Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from hybrid/EV battery interface module B. Cell-voltage, current or temperature values fail plausibility checks against other inputs and are rejected.

s: A receiving module detected implausible data from hybrid/EV battery interface module C. Cell-voltage, current or temperature values fail plausibility checks against other inputs and are rejected.

s: A receiving module detected implausible data from hybrid/EV battery interface module M. Cell-voltage, current or temperature values fail plausibility checks against other inputs and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Battery Monitor Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the 12-V battery monitor (intelligent battery sensor). Voltage, current or temperature values fail plausibility checks and are rejected; SoC estimation reverts to a default model.

t: Invalid Data Received From Particulate Matter Sensor B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from particulate matter sensor B (smart sensor with own ECU). PM concentration values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Planetary Gear Set Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the planetary gear set control module (typical in power-split hybrid eCVT). Speed/torque distribution values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Brake Blending Actuator
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the brake blending actuator (manages mix of regen + friction braking on hybrids/EVs). Pressure command vs. actual fails plausibility checks and is rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Brake System Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from brake system control module B (secondary brake controller in twin-system architectures). Pressure, slip or pedal-feel values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Catalyst Heater Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the catalyst heater control module (electrically heated catalyst, EHC). Heater current/voltage or temperature values fail plausibility checks and are rejected; emissions warm-up cannot be guaranteed.

t: Invalid Data Received From Switch Input Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from switch input module A (multiplexed switch reader for steering/console buttons). Button state values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Switch Input Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from switch input module B (multiplexed switch reader for steering/console buttons). Button state values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Battery Management Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the battery management control module (BMS master). SoC, SoH, current or voltage values fail plausibility checks against other inputs and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received from Communication Module
s: A control module receives data from the telematics/communication module that is implausible, has the wrong format or fails checksum. Connected services and emergency-call functions may stop working.

s: A receiving module detected implausible data from digital audio control module D (DSP / source matrix). Channel routing, EQ or volume values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

s: A receiving module detected implausible data from entrapment control module A (anti-pinch master for windows, sunroof, doors). Force/torque limit values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Image Processing Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from image processing module A. Object detections, lane lines or sign recognitions fail plausibility checks against other ADAS sensors and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Image Processing Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from image processing module B. Object detections, lane lines or sign recognitions fail plausibility checks against other ADAS sensors and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Image Processing Module C
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from image processing module C. Object detections, lane lines or sign recognitions fail plausibility checks against other ADAS sensors and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Entrapment Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from entrapment control module B (anti-pinch master for windows, sunroof, doors). Force/torque limit values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Headlamp Control Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from headlamp control module A (matrix LED / adaptive driving beam). Beam segment or actuator values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Headlamp Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from headlamp control module B (matrix LED / adaptive driving beam). Beam segment or actuator values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Parking Assist Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from parking assist module B. Ultrasonic distance values or trajectory commands fail plausibility checks and are rejected, suspending automated parking.

t: Invalid Data Received From Running Board Control Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from running board control module A. Position or motor current values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Entertainment Control Module — Front
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the front entertainment control module. Source select, audio routing or display state values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Seat Control Module E
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from seat control module E. Seat position, memory recall or heating/ventilation values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Seat Control Module F
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from seat control module F. Seat position, memory recall or heating/ventilation values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Remote Accessory Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the remote accessory module (aftermarket / OEM accessory bus controller). Status flags or command values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Entertainment Control Module — Rear B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from rear entertainment control module B (rear-seat infotainment). Source select, audio routing or display state values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Interior Lighting Control Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from interior lighting control module A. Ambient lighting zone, reading lamp or door courtesy light commands fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Seat Control Module G
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from seat control module G. Seat position, memory recall or heating/ventilation values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Seat Control Module H
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from seat control module H. Seat position, memory recall or heating/ventilation values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Seat Control Module J
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from seat control module J. Seat position, memory recall or heating/ventilation values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Side Obstacle Detection Control Module C
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from side obstacle detection module C (corner radar). Distance/closing-speed values fail plausibility checks and are rejected; blind-spot warning may be inhibited.

t: Invalid Data Received From Side Obstacle Detection Control Module D
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from side obstacle detection module D (corner radar). Distance/closing-speed values fail plausibility checks and are rejected; blind-spot warning may be inhibited.

t: Invalid Data Received From Impact Classification System Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the impact classification module. Crash sensor profile values fail plausibility checks against other restraint inputs and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Running Board Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from running board control module B. Position or motor current values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Lighting Control Module — Rear B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from rear lighting control module B. Tail/brake/turn/reverse lamp command vs. feedback values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Accessory Protocol Interface Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the accessory protocol interface module (APIM). Infotainment/voice/connected service values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Remote Start Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the remote-start module. Engine pre-start request or status values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Front Display Interface Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the front display interface module. Center-stack screen status, climate readout or infotainment menu state values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Front Controls Interface Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from front controls interface module A. Hard-key, rotary knob or steering-wheel switch state values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Front Controls/Display Interface Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the combined front controls/display interface module. Both screen and hard-key state values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Radio Transceiver
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the radio transceiver. Tuner, satellite or DAB reception state values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Special Purpose Vehicle Control Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from special-purpose vehicle (SPV) control module A. Upfit function (emergency lighting, sirens, fleet relays, PTO/auxiliary) status values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Special Purpose Vehicle Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from special-purpose vehicle (SPV) control module B. Upfit function (emergency lighting, sirens, fleet relays, PTO/auxiliary) status values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Special Purpose Vehicle Control Module C
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from special-purpose vehicle (SPV) control module C. Upfit function (emergency lighting, sirens, fleet relays, PTO/auxiliary) status values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Special Purpose Vehicle Control Module D
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from special-purpose vehicle (SPV) control module D. Upfit function (emergency lighting, sirens, fleet relays, PTO/auxiliary) status values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

s: A receiving module detected implausible data from front controls interface module B. Hard-key, rotary knob or steering-wheel switch state values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Electronic Brake Booster Control Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from electronic brake booster module A. Boost assist, brake-by-wire pedal feedback or regen-blending values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Electronic Brake Booster Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from electronic brake booster module B. Boost assist, brake-by-wire pedal feedback or regen-blending values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Seat Control Switch Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from seat control switch module A. Button state for seat adjustment, lumbar or memory recall fails plausibility checks and is rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Seat Control Switch Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from seat control switch module B. Button state for seat adjustment, lumbar or memory recall fails plausibility checks and is rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Audio Amplifier B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from audio amplifier B. Channel level, source select or fault status values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Speech Recognition Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the speech recognition module. Recognised command or dialog state values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Camera Module — Rear
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the rear camera module. Image stream, dynamic guide line or cross-traffic detection values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Image Processing Sensor A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from image processing sensor A. ADAS-relevant detections (lane lines, signs, objects) fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Image Processing Sensor B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from image processing sensor B. ADAS-relevant detections (lane lines, signs, objects) fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

s: A receiving module detected implausible data from image processing sensor C. ADAS-relevant detections (lane lines, signs, objects) fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

s: A receiving module detected implausible data from image processing sensor D. ADAS-relevant detections (lane lines, signs, objects) fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

s: A receiving module detected implausible data from image processing sensor E. ADAS-relevant detections (lane lines, signs, objects) fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

s: A receiving module detected implausible data from image processing sensor F. ADAS-relevant detections (lane lines, signs, objects) fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

s: A receiving module detected implausible data from image processing sensor G. ADAS-relevant detections (lane lines, signs, objects) fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

s: A receiving module detected implausible data from image processing sensor H. ADAS-relevant detections (lane lines, signs, objects) fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

s: A receiving module detected implausible data from image processing sensor I. ADAS-relevant detections (lane lines, signs, objects) fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

s: A receiving module detected implausible data from image processing sensor J. ADAS-relevant detections (lane lines, signs, objects) fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

s: A receiving module detected implausible data from image processing sensor K. ADAS-relevant detections (lane lines, signs, objects) fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Image Processing Sensor L
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from image processing sensor L. ADAS-relevant detections (lane lines, signs, objects) fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Vehicle Motion Control Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from vehicle motion control module A (integrated chassis controller arbitrating between brake/steer/drive). Trajectory or actuator command values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Vehicle Motion Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from vehicle motion control module B (integrated chassis controller arbitrating between brake/steer/drive). Trajectory or actuator command values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Lighting Driver Control Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from lighting driver control module A. LED matrix segment or adaptive headlamp values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Lighting Driver Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from lighting driver control module B. LED matrix segment or adaptive headlamp values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Lighting Driver Control Module C
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from lighting driver control module C. LED matrix segment or adaptive headlamp values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Lighting Driver Control Module D
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from lighting driver control module D. LED matrix segment or adaptive headlamp values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Seat Module K
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from seat control module K. Seat position, memory recall or heating/ventilation values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Seat Module L
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from seat control module L. Seat position, memory recall or heating/ventilation values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Battery Charger Control Module C
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from battery charger control module C. Charge current, voltage or grid sync values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Battery Charger Control Module D
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from battery charger control module D. Charge current, voltage or grid sync values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Off-Board Charger Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the off-board charger module (DC fast-charge negotiation). Session state or current/voltage values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Haptic Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the haptic control module. Vibration command values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Active Grille Air Shutter Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from active grille shutter module A. Position or actuator command values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received from Navigation Display Module
s: The infotainment system receives invalid map or display data from the navigation module. Map view freezes or shows blank tiles.

t: Invalid Data Received From Radiator Anti-Tamper Device
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the radiator anti-tamper device. Tamper-detection state values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received from Navigation Control Module
s: The infotainment receives implausible position or routing data from the navigation controller. Routing and traffic functions can fail.

t: Invalid Data Received From DC/AC Converter Control Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from DC/AC inverter module A. Drive-motor torque or AC-outlet supply values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From DC/AC Converter Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from DC/AC inverter module B. Drive-motor torque or AC-outlet supply values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Transmission Fluid Pump Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from transmission fluid pump module B. Pump speed or pressure values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Active Grille Air Shutter Module C
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from active grille shutter module C. Position or actuator command values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Active Grille Air Shutter Module D
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from active grille shutter module D. Position or actuator command values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Gear Shift Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from gear shift control module B. Shift-by-wire request or position values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Drive Motor Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from drive motor control module B. Torque, speed or current values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Hybrid/EV Powertrain Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the hybrid/EV powertrain control module (master coordinator for engine + motor + battery). Torque request or mode-state values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Powertrain Control Monitor Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the powertrain control monitor (independent watchdog comparing ECM/PCM commands against sensor inputs). Status flags fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From AC/AC Converter Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the AC/AC converter control module (transformer/frequency-converter for industrial-vehicle accessories). Voltage or frequency values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From AC/DC Converter Control Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from AC/DC converter (on-board charger) module A. Charging current/voltage or grid sync values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From AC/DC Converter Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from AC/DC converter (on-board charger) module B. Charging current/voltage or grid sync values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From DC/DC Converter Control Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from DC/DC converter module A. Output current or voltage values fail plausibility checks and are rejected; 12-V system may face load shedding.

t: Invalid Data Received From DC/DC Converter Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from DC/DC converter module B. Output current or voltage values fail plausibility checks and are rejected; 12-V system may face load shedding.

t: Invalid Data Received From Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Sensor Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the high-voltage battery pack sensor module. Cell-voltage and temperature values fail plausibility checks and are rejected; SoC and SoH calculations switch to a default model.

t: Invalid Data Received From Drive Motor Control Module C
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from drive motor control module C. Torque, speed or current values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Drive Motor Control Module D
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from drive motor control module D. Torque, speed or current values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From NOx Sensor A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from NOx sensor A (smart sensor with own ECU). NOx concentration or pumping current values fail plausibility checks and are rejected; SCR control falls back to substitute values.

t: Invalid Data Received From NOx Sensor B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from NOx sensor B (smart sensor with own ECU). NOx concentration or pumping current values fail plausibility checks and are rejected; SCR control falls back to substitute values.

t: Invalid Data Received From Evaporative Emission System Leak Detection Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the EVAP leak detection module. Tank-pressure or vacuum values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: NOx Sensor A Received Invalid Data From ECM/PCM
s: NOx sensor A (smart sensor with own ECU) received implausible data from the ECM/PCM. Engine load, fuel rate or temperature data needed for the sensor's internal compensation fails plausibility checks; the sensor reports degraded readings.

t: NOx Sensor B Received Invalid Data From ECM/PCM
s: NOx sensor B (smart sensor with own ECU) received implausible data from the ECM/PCM. Engine load, fuel rate or temperature data needed for the sensor's internal compensation fails plausibility checks; the sensor reports degraded readings.

t: Invalid Data Received From Reductant Quality Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the reductant (DEF/AdBlue) quality sensor module. Concentration values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Particulate Matter Sensor Received Invalid Data From ECM/PCM
s: The particulate matter (PM) sensor (smart sensor with own ECU) received implausible data from the ECM/PCM. Engine load, exhaust temperature or DPF state data needed for compensation fails plausibility checks; PM readings are degraded.

t: Invalid Data Received From NH3 Sensor
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the ammonia (NH3) slip sensor downstream of the SCR. Concentration values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Reductant Heater Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the reductant heater module. Heater current/voltage or temperature values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Safety Integration Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the safety integration module that arbitrates between ADAS, restraint, brake and steering systems. Cross-system safety status values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From NOx Sensor C
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from NOx sensor C (smart sensor with own ECU). NOx concentration or pumping current values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: NOx Sensor C Received Invalid Data From ECM/PCM
s: NOx sensor C (smart sensor with own ECU) received implausible data from the ECM/PCM. Engine load, fuel rate or temperature data needed for the sensor's internal compensation fails plausibility checks; the sensor reports degraded readings.

t: Invalid Data Received From Charge Air Cooler Coolant Pump
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the charge air cooler (intercooler) coolant pump. Pump speed or flow values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Engine Disconnect Clutch
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the hybrid engine disconnect clutch actuator. Position or pressure values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Vehicle Thermal Management Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the vehicle thermal management module. Coolant loop coordination values fail plausibility checks and are rejected; sub-modules may revert to local control.

t: Invalid Data Received From Comfort and Convenience Display A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from comfort and convenience display A. Display state or input values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Comfort and Convenience Display B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from comfort and convenience display B. Display state or input values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Driver Monitoring System Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the driver monitoring system (DMS) module. Eye/head-pose tracking values fail plausibility checks and are rejected; ADAS handover features may be inhibited.

t: Invalid Data Received From Front Radar Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from front radar module A. Distance/closing-speed values fail plausibility checks against camera/lidar and are rejected; ACC, AEB and FCW degrade.

t: Invalid Data Received From Front Radar Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from front radar module B. Distance/closing-speed values fail plausibility checks against camera/lidar and are rejected; ACC, AEB and FCW degrade.

t: Invalid Data Received From Rear Radar Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from rear radar module A. Distance/azimuth values fail plausibility checks and are rejected; blind-spot warning and rear cross-traffic alert are inhibited.

t: Invalid Data Received From Rear Radar Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from rear radar module B. Distance/azimuth values fail plausibility checks and are rejected; blind-spot warning and rear cross-traffic alert are inhibited.

t: Invalid Data Received From Rear Radar Module C
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from rear radar module C. Distance/azimuth values fail plausibility checks and are rejected; blind-spot warning and rear cross-traffic alert are inhibited.

t: Invalid Data Received From Rear Radar Module D
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from rear radar module D. Distance/azimuth values fail plausibility checks and are rejected; blind-spot warning and rear cross-traffic alert are inhibited.

t: Invalid Data Received From Localization and Mapping Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the localization and mapping module (HD map / SLAM ECU). Position or map-attribute values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Night Vision Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the night vision module. Infrared image stream or pedestrian detection values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Trailer Backup Assist Control Module
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from the trailer backup assist module. Hitch angle or trajectory values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Interior Lighting Control Module B
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from interior lighting control module B. Ambient lighting zone, reading lamp or door courtesy light commands fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Invalid Data Received From Active Radiator Air Flow Control Module A
s: A receiving module detected implausible data from active radiator air flow control module A. Active grille shutter or fan staging values fail plausibility checks and are rejected.

t: Internal Control Module Memory Reset
s: A control module reports that its non-volatile memory has been reset (lost adaptions, lost coding, lost trip counters). Often appears after battery disconnects, voltage drops below operating limit, or module reflashes.

t: Internal Control Module Software Incompatibility
s: A control module has detected that its own internal software version is inconsistent — for example a partial flash that left the module with mismatched calibration and program code. The module may go offline or operate in a fallback mode.

t: Lost Communication With Particulate Filter Pressure Sensor B
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart particulate filter (DPF) differential pressure sensor B. The ECM cannot read soot loading via this channel and may switch to a model-based estimate.

t: Lost Communication With Fuel Pressure Sensor A
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart fuel pressure sensor A (typically common-rail or low-pressure side). The ECM loses its actual rail-pressure feedback for closed-loop control.

t: Lost Communication With Fuel Pressure Sensor B
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart fuel pressure sensor B (typically common-rail or low-pressure side). The ECM loses its actual rail-pressure feedback for closed-loop control.

t: Lost Communication With A/C Refrigerant Sensor A
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart A/C refrigerant sensor A. Pressure or composition feedback for the refrigeration loop is unavailable; A/C may default to off.

t: Lost Communication With Throttle/Pedal Position Sensor/Switch A
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart throttle/pedal position sensor A. The ECM loses one of the redundant pedal channels and reverts to a fail-safe pedal map.

t: Lost Communication With Throttle/Pedal Position Sensor/Switch B
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart throttle/pedal position sensor B. The ECM loses one of the redundant pedal channels and reverts to a fail-safe pedal map.

t: Lost Communication With Throttle/Pedal Position Sensor/Switch C
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart throttle/pedal position sensor C. The ECM loses one of the redundant pedal channels and reverts to a fail-safe pedal map.

t: Lost Communication With Manifold Absolute Pressure/Barometric Pressure Sensor
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart MAP/BARO sensor. Without these inputs, ECM load and altitude correction switch to fallback values.

t: Lost Communication With Manifold Absolute Pressure Sensor B
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart MAP sensor B. Engine load calculation switches to a fallback model based on MAF and RPM.

t: Lost Communication With Turbocharger/Supercharger Boost Sensor A
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart boost pressure sensor A. The boost-control loop loses its actual feedback and reverts to an open-loop fallback that limits boost.

t: Lost Communication With Turbocharger/Supercharger Boost Sensor B
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart boost pressure sensor B. The boost-control loop loses its actual feedback and reverts to an open-loop fallback that limits boost.

t: Lost Communication With Turbocharger/Supercharger Boost Sensor C
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart boost pressure sensor C. The boost-control loop loses its actual feedback and reverts to an open-loop fallback that limits boost.

t: Lost Communication With Crankcase Pressure Sensor
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart crankcase pressure sensor. PCV/blow-by monitoring cannot be evaluated and the related emission monitor cannot run.

t: Lost Communication With Mass or Volume Air Flow Sensor A
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart MAF/MVF sensor A. Air-mass calculation switches to a fallback model from MAP, RPM and IAT.

t: Lost Communication With Mass or Volume Air Flow Sensor B
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart MAF/MVF sensor B. Air-mass calculation switches to a fallback model from MAP, RPM and IAT.

t: Lost Communication With Intake Air Temperature Sensor 1 Bank 1
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart IAT sensor 1 on bank 1. Charge-air density correction reverts to a substitute value.

t: Lost Communication With Intake Air Temperature Sensor 1 Bank 2
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart IAT sensor 1 on bank 2. Charge-air density correction reverts to a substitute value.

t: Lost Communication With Intake Air Temperature Sensor 2 Bank 1
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart IAT sensor 2 on bank 1 (typically post-intercooler). Charge-air density correction reverts to a substitute value.

t: Lost Communication With Intake Air Temperature Sensor 2 Bank 2
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart IAT sensor 2 on bank 2 (typically post-intercooler). Charge-air density correction reverts to a substitute value.

t: Lost Communication With Engine Coolant Bypass Valve A
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart engine coolant bypass valve A. Bypass switching for thermal management cannot be commanded.

t: Lost Communication With Engine Coolant Bypass Valve B
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart engine coolant bypass valve B. Bypass switching for thermal management cannot be commanded.

t: Lost Communication With Engine Coolant Bypass Valve C
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart engine coolant bypass valve C. Bypass switching for thermal management cannot be commanded.

t: Lost Communication With Engine Coolant Bypass Valve D
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart engine coolant bypass valve D. Bypass switching for thermal management cannot be commanded.

t: Lost Communication With Reductant Level Sensor A
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart reductant (DEF/AdBlue) level sensor A. Tank-level monitoring switches to a substitute model; refill warnings may be incorrect.

t: Lost Communication With Reductant Level Sensor B
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart reductant (DEF/AdBlue) level sensor B. Tank-level monitoring switches to a substitute model; refill warnings may be incorrect.

t: Lost Communication With Reductant Level Sensor C
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart reductant (DEF/AdBlue) level sensor C. Tank-level monitoring switches to a substitute model; refill warnings may be incorrect.

t: Lost Communication With Reductant Temperature Sensor A
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart reductant (DEF/AdBlue) temperature sensor A. Heater control and freeze protection lose their primary feedback.

t: Lost Communication With Reductant Temperature Sensor B
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart reductant (DEF/AdBlue) temperature sensor B. Heater control and freeze protection lose their primary feedback.

t: Lost Communication With Battery Isolation/Voltage Stabilization Control Module
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with the battery isolation / voltage stabilization module (typical in start/stop systems). Cranking voltage stabilization and second-battery switching cannot be commanded.

t: Lost Communication With Exhaust Gas Temperature Sensor Bank 1 Sensor 1
s: The vehicle bus reports loss of communication with smart exhaust gas temperature sensor bank 1 sensor 1 (typically pre-cat). Catalyst protection and DPF regeneration logic switch to model-based estimates.

t: Lost Communication With Exhaust Gas Temperature Sensor Bank 1 Sensor 2
